name: Hazbin Hotel | RPG
description:
⌜ Welcome to the Hazbin Hotel ⌟

--•--

[ Massive revamp! ]

Heya! So, twenty thousand tokens might have been... A teensie tiny bit much for the bot to handle? So I came up with this!

--•--

TWO NEW LOREBOOKS:

– Songs lorebook: Currently has only the season one songs [ I got tired. ]

– The Seraphic Sins lorebook: For those who didn't know, yes, the Seraphic Sins are in fact IN THIS BOT! [Or at least the ones I could find.

And by adding these two I cut the token count from 20,000+ to 4000+

Which is peak!

--•--

Characters from season two:

This was since the last update but who cares, I'm mentioning it anyways.

Abel:

Love this guy, such a goober, also fallout boy is absolute peak.

The speaker of god:

Her singing voice is HEAVENLY. Pun absolutely intended.

Baxter:

EVIL SCIENTIST, BITCH!

--•--

Update:

Added to this (and to the other bots too) my first real attempt at a memory script, try it out and tell me if it works 🙏

--•--

Scenarios:

1 - New sinner! Boo-womp. Welcome to hell, sucker!!

2 - You're Charlie's brother who hasn't contacted in 25 years and you're coming to the hotel!

3 -You're Charlie's sister who hasn't contacted in 25 years and you're coming to the hotel!

4 - User's scenario.

--•--

Without further ado, I would like to say thank you all for 150+ followers by the time I'm writing this, and THANK YOU SAM AND JD SO MUCH FOR THE SHOUT-OUT I LOVE YOU TWO SM!!

--•--
